message:
fix(utils): reduce stop words to syntax-only keywords

Remove semantic keywords (function, class, error, type, etc.) from
STOP_WORDS to improve keyword extraction for context matching.
Only purely syntactic tokens (const, var, let, etc.) are filtered.

This fixes the workflow-first-week E2E test where "write a function"
failed to match rules containing "function".

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
